hook.text: A company creates dozens of smaller budgets. They all roll up into one master plan.

buildup.text: The master budget combines sales, production, purchasing, labor, overhead, and capital budgets.

discovery.text: It produces a projected income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement for the period.

twist.text: If the sales budget is wrong, every other budget built on it will be wrong too.

climax.text: The master budget is the company's financial blueprint—every department contributes a piece.

punchline.text: One plan unites every department's numbers.

quiz.question: What does a master budget combine?
options: All individual department budgets into one plan
